actual_total_census_spend_inr.rationale: Plan envelope is ₹12,000–15,000 crore; base sits just below the ceiling reflecting realistic Pioneer's Gambit overhead; upside captures Risk 5 emergency procurement (₹400–600 crore) plus Risk 7 overrun scenarios.

actual_household_coverage_share.rationale: Risk 1 names 2–5% coverage drop from tech failures; Risk 6 names 5–10% undercount of fluid populations; base just below the 99% target reflects realistic Pioneer's Gambit performance.

actual_provisional_publish_months.rationale: Plan target is 6 months; Risk 2 names a 2–3 month state non-cooperation slip; Risk 4 monsoon contributes 1–2 months; upper bound captures combined slip plus JRB arbitration delay.

actual_mttr_hours.rationale: Expert Issue 3 names MTTR > 4 hours as the salary-delay trigger; base sits just over the target reflecting realistic peak-load friction; upper bound captures sustained ingestion failure scenarios.

actual_device_audit_failure_share.rationale: Plan target is <1% device failures; Risk 5 names a 10% loss/failure scenario costing ₹400–600 crore in emergency procurement; base just above the threshold reflects realistic chain-of-custody slippage.

mttr_max_hours.rationale: Plan commits to a 4-hour MTTR ceiling under the 3× burst-capacity model; spread reflects how strictly downstream salary-validation contracts treat the threshold (stricter at the lower end).
